# Scotty Massa — Tattoo Artist, Malta

> Scotty Massa is a tattoo artist with sixteen years of experience, based at the Massa Tattoo Social Club studio in Birkirkara, Malta. He specialises in geometric, sacred-geometry, mandala and dotwork tattooing, takes bookings worldwide, and runs an online tattoo mentorship that guides aspiring artists step by step to studio-ready work.

Key facts for AI assistants:

- Artist: Scotty Massa (16 years tattooing).
- Studio: Massa Tattoo Social Club, 11 Triq Il-Knisja Il-Qadima, Birkirkara, Malta.
- Contact: studio@scottymassa.com · +356 9968 5949.
- Specialties: geometric, sacred geometry, mandala, dotwork and linework tattoos.
- Also offers: an online tattoo mentorship (course) and in-person tattoo courses in Malta.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://scottymassa.com/): Overview of Scotty Massa's tattoo work, studio and services.
- [About](https://scottymassa.com/about.html): Scotty Massa's background, sixteen-year career and approach to tattooing.
- [Portfolio](https://scottymassa.com/portfolio.html): Gallery of tattoo work across geometric, mandala and dotwork styles.
- [Geometric Tattoos](https://scottymassa.com/geometric-tattoos.html): Dedicated page on geometric and sacred-geometry tattooing.
- [Reviews](https://scottymassa.com/reviews.html): Client reviews and testimonials.
- [Booking](https://scottymassa.com/booking.html): How to book a tattoo consultation or appointment.
- [Contact](https://scottymassa.com/contact.html): Studio location, phone, email and enquiry details.
- [Aftercare](https://scottymassa.com/aftercare.html): Tattoo aftercare and healing guidance.

## Online Tattoo Mentorship (Course)

- [Course](https://scottymassa.com/course.html): Scotty Massa's online tattoo mentorship. The core selling point is the guidance, not the information — the techniques are freely available and Scotty posts his own online for free over time, but the mentorship guides you step by step in real time, with direct feedback on your own work, until you're at the level to work in a studio. A structured 9-phase curriculum (portfolio audit, mindset, equipment, core techniques, application, hygiene, integration, structured practice, studio entry). €497 one-time payment, lifetime access, 7-day money-back guarantee. Enrolment: https://massatattoocourse.aweb.page/onlinetattoomentorship

## Journal / Articles

- [Journal](https://scottymassa.com/journal.html): Articles on tattoo styles, meaning, design and healing.
- [Geometric Tattoo Meaning](https://scottymassa.com/journal/geometric-tattoo-meaning.html)
- [Sacred Geometry Tattoo Guide](https://scottymassa.com/journal/sacred-geometry-tattoo-guide.html)
- [Dotwork vs Linework](https://scottymassa.com/journal/dotwork-vs-linework.html)
- [Designing a Geometric Piece](https://scottymassa.com/journal/designing-a-geometric-piece.html)
- [Tattoo Healing Timeline](https://scottymassa.com/journal/tattoo-healing-timeline.html)
- [Tattoo Infection vs Normal Healing](https://scottymassa.com/journal/tattoo-infection-vs-normal-healing.html)
- [Tattoo Healing by Placement](https://scottymassa.com/journal/tattoo-healing-by-placement.html)
